---
title: "People"
#image: files/group.jpeg
page-layout: full
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: lab-member
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://drganghe.github.io
      image: https://drganghe.github.io/files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg
      title: "Gang He"
#      author: 
      description: "Assistant Professor, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://kaifangluo.com
      image: /files/headshots/kaifang-luo.jpeg
      title: "Kaifang Luo"
#      author: 
      description: "Post-doc, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://giselle1119.github.io/
      image: https://giselle1119.github.io/images/WengeRao.png
      title: "Wenge Rao"
#      author: 
      description: "Visiting PhD Student, CUNY-Baruch College"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


- id: lab-collaborator
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.jhelvy.com/
      image: /files/headshots/john-helveston.png
      title: "John Helveston"
#      author: 
      description: "Assistant Professor, George Washington University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://liqunpeng.com
      image: /files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpeg
      title: "Liqun Peng"
#      author: 
      description: "Post-doc, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://gps.ucsd.edu/faculty-directory/michael-davidson.html
      image: https://gps.ucsd.edu/_images/people/faculty/faculty_davidson.jpg
      title: "Michael Davidson"
#      author: 
      description: "Assistant Professor, University of California, San Diego"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://es.ucsb.edu/people/ranjit-deshmukh
      image: https://es.ucsb.edu/sites/default/files/styles/max_650x650/public/2024-07/Deshmukh%2C%20Ranjit.jpg
      title: "Ranjit Deshmukh"
#      author: 
      description: "Assistant Professor, University of California, Santa Barbara"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


    - path: https://www.geog.hku.hk/lb-liu
      image: https://liulaibao.quarto.pub/lab/files/images/Photo_LiuLaibao.png
      title: "Laibao Liu"
#      author: 
      description: "Assistant Professor, Hong Kong University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://sem.tongji.edu.cn/semen/12413.html
      image: https://sem.tongji.edu.cn/semen/wp-content/uploads/sites/3/2015/08/zhangchao.jpg
      title: "Chao Zhang"
#      author: 
      description: "Professor, Tongji University"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


- id: lab-advisor
  sort: "title asc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://kammen.berkeley.edu/
      image: https://erg.berkeley.edu/wp-content/uploads/2023/07/IMG_1912-scaled-e1688583339173.jpg
      title: "Daniel M. Kammen"
#      author: 
      description: "Professor, Univeristy of California, Berkeley"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

    - path: https://eta.lbl.gov/people/jiang-lin
      image: https://are.berkeley.edu/sites/are.berkeley.edu/files/styles/user_big_picture/public/pictures/picture-13749-1602716599.jpg
      title: "Jiang Lin"
#      author: 
      description: "Staff Scientist, Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 

page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
toc: false

format:
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
---

## Team

:::{#lab-member}
:::


## Alumni

:::{#lab-alumni}
:::


## Collaborators

:::{#lab-collaborator}
:::


## Advisors

:::{#lab-advisor}
:::

<!--

## Researchers

::: {.grid}

<!--Lecture 1-2-->

<!--

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/profile/gang-he-cuny-profile.jpg)

<center> 

Assistant Professor, CUNY-Baruch College

[Gang He](https://drganghe.github.io)

</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/headshots/kaifang-luo.jpeg)

<center>

Post-doc, CUNY-Baruch College

[Kaifang Luo](https://kaifangluo.com)

</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/images/we-need-you.png)

<center>Join us</center>

:::

:::

## Collaborators

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://gps.ucsd.edu/_images/people/faculty/faculty_davidson.jpg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Michael Davidson](https://gps.ucsd.edu/faculty-directory/michael-davidson.html)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/9012994?v=4){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[John Helveston](https://www.jhelvy.com/)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](/files/headshots/liqun-peng.jpeg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Liqun Peng](https://eta.lbl.gov/people/liqun-peng-0)</center>

:::

:::

-->

<!--
## Advisors

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://kammen.berkeley.edu/images/Kammen_solar.jpg){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Daniel Kammen](https://kammen.berkeley.edu/)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://are.berkeley.edu/sites/are.berkeley.edu/files/styles/user_big_picture/public/pictures/picture-13749-1602716599.jpg?itok=i8mLR_AR){fig-align="center"}

<center>[Jiang Lin](https://are.berkeley.edu/users/jiang-lin)</center>

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![](https://cee.princeton.edu/sites/g/files/toruqf2216/files/styles/3x4_750w_1000h/public/people/mauzerall.jpg?itok=ilA0fH9K){height="200pt" fig-align="center"}

<center>[Denise L. Mauzerall](https://mauzerall.scholar.princeton.edu/)</center>

:::

:::
-->
